Task: Initialize Unity 2022.3 LTS project scaffold with URP, Input System, NGO, Unity Transport, Lobby, Relay, Addressables, Cinemachine
Acceptance_Criteria: Project opens cleanly in Unity 2022.3 LTS; required packages pinned and installed; bootstrap scene created; CI headless validation scene load passes

Task: Establish architecture folder/module boundaries and service seams (Combat, Puzzle, AI, Networking, UI, Progression, Save) including INetworkRuntime abstraction
Acceptance_Criteria: Folder structure matches selected architecture; assembly definitions compile with no circular deps; INetworkRuntime interface used by gameplay layer with NGO adapter implementation

Task: Configure platform profiles and runtime budgets (WebGL/mobile/Xbox quality tiers, tick settings, VFX caps)
Acceptance_Criteria: Runtime config asset exposes per-platform tick/quality presets; WebGL defaults to 20Hz profile; mobile adaptive quality toggle works; Xbox preset is selectable

Task: Implement fixed-arc ballistic firing system with ScriptableObject weapon profiles and host-authoritative hit resolution
Acceptance_Criteria: No manual barrel tilt in controls; tap/hold fire bands map to defined weapon profiles; host resolves projectile impact and damage; client receives confirmed impact events

Task: Add client trajectory preview, landing marker feedback, and ghost-arc miss assist tied to accessibility settings
Acceptance_Criteria: Charge preview renders predicted arc; marker color states (neutral/destructible/enemy) are visible; optional ghost replay appears after miss; all toggles persisted in settings

Task: Implement destructible system with networked states (Intact/Cracked/Destroyed) and material classes (brittle/reinforced/explosive/support)
Acceptance_Criteria: Destructibles replicate state to all clients; each material class responds per design rules; support-collapse and chain explosion events trigger deterministic gameplay outcomes

Task: Implement ramp traversal and slope validation system with directional metadata and traction profiles
Acceptance_Criteria: Ramp metadata authoring component exists; tanks correctly traverse valid slope lanes; invalid slopes are blocked with readable feedback; behavior parity verified in host/client

Task: Build networked pickup system (health box, mystery box, power-up spawner) with host-seeded RNG
Acceptance_Criteria: Pickup spawn/consume is host-authoritative; mystery outcomes derived from match seed; respawn policies configurable by mode; clients show synchronized pickup state

Task: Implement Blue and Green player tank classes with data-driven stat profiles and selectable loadout flow
Acceptance_Criteria: Blue and Green tanks selectable pre-match; stat deltas are ScriptableObject-driven; both classes can complete baseline test level; class choice syncs in multiplayer lobby

Task: Implement AI framework (FSM + utility scoring + blackboard) with NavMesh movement and action points
Acceptance_Criteria: AI brain supports state transitions from utility weights; shared blackboard tracks target/cover/objective data; NavMesh movement and puzzle action points execute reliably

Task: Ship red enemy variants: Scout, Bruiser, Sniper, and Saboteur/Engineer behaviors with readable telegraphs
Acceptance_Criteria: All four enemy variants spawn and execute distinct behavior profiles; attack windups include audio/visual telegraphs; encounter test scene validates role differentiation

Task: Implement final boss tank (Crimson Bastion style) with 3 phases, arena interaction hooks, and transition checkpoints
Acceptance_Criteria: Boss has at least 3 scripted phases with unique mechanics; phase transitions include checkpoint restore points; kill condition requires mechanic execution not pure DPS race

Task: Implement multiplayer session flow using UGS Lobby + Relay (create/join/invite, ready-up, scene sync, host disconnect handling)
Acceptance_Criteria: Two-player co-op flow works end-to-end through Lobby/Relay; ready state gates match start; synchronized scene load succeeds; host disconnect exits gracefully with rejoin prompt

Task: Implement authoritative match state replication for objectives, destructibles, pickups, HP/ammo/power-up state, and results payload
Acceptance_Criteria: Critical match state remains consistent between host/client through full mission; end-of-match summary includes score, stars, and objective completion; no client authority on puzzle outcomes

Task: Implement world map progression + save system for 3 maps x 5 nodes, star unlock logic, and profile persistence
Acceptance_Criteria: World map displays 15 nodes across 3 maps; unlocks follow star thresholds; local save/load persists stars, unlocks, selected tank, and settings; corruption fallback path exists

Task: Build Map 1 (5 nodes) including onboarding beats, destructible/ramp puzzles, and mini-boss endpoint
Acceptance_Criteria: Map 1 contains 5 playable nodes with intended pacing; onboarding objectives validate fixed-arc learning beats; each node has clear win/fail conditions and star targets

Task: Build Map 2 and Map 3 (10 nodes total) including mixed-enemy escalation and final boss stage integration
Acceptance_Criteria: Maps 2-3 provide 10 playable nodes with escalation per design doc; map gates and branch rules function; stage 15 integrates final boss encounter and completion cinematic trigger

Task: Implement required menu stack and HUD flow (Splash, Main, Mode Select, Tank Select, World Map, Pause, Results)
Acceptance_Criteria: All required menus are navigable via keyboard/gamepad/touch; in-game HUD shows objective, HP, ammo, power-up, and star condition context; pause/resume behaves correctly in solo and co-op

Task: Implement settings, keybind remap, accessibility options, and platform input presets (KBM/touch/gamepad)
Acceptance_Criteria: Settings include audio sliders, graphics preset, color/contrast options, UI scale, camera shake, subtitle controls; keybind remap persists; per-platform defaults load correctly

Task: Implement event-driven audio and VFX routing with pooled emitters and platform-appropriate variants
Acceptance_Criteria: AudioEventCatalog and VFXRouter consume gameplay events; muzzle/impact/destruction/pickup feedback present; WebGL/mobile use reduced-cost variants without missing critical telegraphs

Task: Add deterministic diagnostics and QA instrumentation (TickId event tagging, periodic state hash checks, debug overlay, seed replay harness)
Acceptance_Criteria: Critical gameplay events carry monotonic TickId in debug logs; periodic host/client state hash diff is reported in debug builds; seed replay command reproduces encounter state deterministically enough for triage

Task: Define deployment path and CI/CD for WebGL/mobile/Xbox including build scripts, artifact naming, smoke checks, and release checklist
Acceptance_Criteria: CI can produce WebGL and mobile dev artifacts on demand; Xbox path documented with cert checklist and manual gate; release checklist includes smoke tests, known-issues triage, and rollback procedure
